# 1099Deductions
> Complete 1099 tax deductions guide for US independent contractors 2026. IRS mileage 72.5¢/mile, SE tax 15.3%, QBI 20% deduction. Covers DoorDash, Uber, Instacart, Airbnb, OnlyFans, all platforms.

## Key Pages
- [1099 tax deductions hub 2026](https://www.1099deductions.com/)
- [Quarterly tax deadlines Apr 15, Jun 16, Sep 15, Jan 15](https://www.1099deductions.com/quarterly-tax-guide-2026.html)
- [Complete 1099 deductions list 2026](https://www.1099deductions.com/1099-tax-deductions-list.html)
- [Self-employed tax deductions checklist](https://www.1099deductions.com/self-employed-tax-deductions-checklist.html)
- [OBBBA 2026 tax changes — $2,000 threshold, $25,000 tips](https://www.1099deductions.com/obbba-tax-changes-2026.html)
